you_are_here: Phases 4, 5, 7 active — Rubric · Sourcing Layer · Live Data Capture. Both pipelines live-tested working. E2E TEST + distribution track PARKED until post-Ishwa context call (w/c 20 Jul). Sourcing Assistant at v3.1 with search fingerprints + duplicate detection.

summary.build_time: Live capture pipeline (15.2 + Sheet 19 + contained 17.4) live-tested working. Sourcing Assistant 16.2 v3.1 + Search Log 20.2 v3.1 deployed and verified across two consultants: dismissible save dialog, re-save suppression, consultant-agnostic search fingerprints, soft duplicate flagging.

naming_note.convention: Two-digit sequential for NEW documents; decimal bumps (15.2, 16.2, 17.4) for MAJOR updates — dotted decimals only. Filename bumps are never Claude's default: propose, Amit decides; same-day iterations stay inside the existing filename. Last new-document number used: 20. Script-internal versions (v3.1, v4) are separate lineage.
naming_note.15.2_Ishwa_Combined_Data_Entry_Form.html: LIVE pipeline form — supersedes 15/15.1. Closed/Updated-by attribution. Live-tested 18 Jul.
naming_note.16.2_Ishwa_Sourcing_Assistant.html: v3.1 LIVE — descriptor, sticky bar, dismissible save dialog (x / click-outside / Escape), same-session re-save suppression, server duplicate message. Supersedes 16.1.
naming_note.17.4_Ishwa_Apps_Script_v4_Contained.js: Deployed on Sheet 19 — contained scope (drive.file + bound sheet only).
naming_note.20.2_Ishwa_Search_Log_Apps_Script_Contai: v3.1 DEPLOYED — Sheets-only scope, zero Drive. Search fingerprints + soft duplicate detection (same fingerprint + same consultant → row written with duplicate_of/parent_saved; flat parent mapping to earliest row). Supersedes 20.1.
naming_note.index.html: Hub — cards open in new tab (target=_blank, noopener); points to 15.2 + 16.2.
naming_note.17_Ishwa_Queue_Form.html: RETIRED — legacy back-fill dropped with fresh-build pivot.
naming_note.16.1 / 20.1: RETIRED 18 Jul — superseded by 16.2 / 20.2 (same deployment URL, redeployed as new version).

phases.name: Scoping & Diagnosis
phases.title: Engagement scoping & problem diagnosis
phases.desc: Structured strategy session with Shalini Gupta. Problem diagnosed: Ishwa's quality edge lives entirely in consultant judgement — no documented framework, no structured AI input. Solution architecture defined across three layers.

phases.name: Data Audit
phases.title: Data receipt, audit & documentation
phases.desc: Five data files received from Ishwa (Zoho Recruit + CRM, Sep 2022 — Mar 2026). Full audit completed. Three structural gaps identified. Audit documents, data capture templates, interactive forms built and delivered.

milestone.label: All audit documents, templates and meeting prep delivered

phases.name: Client Inputs
phases.title: 8 April session — decisions locked, build unblocked
phases.desc: Three-step workflow agreed. Data capture path confirmed (Option C — web forms). Order book received from Somanshu and analysed. Minutes, order book analysis, rubric scaffold sent 22 April. Forms live with Ishwa 24 April.

milestone.label: Forms live with Ishwa. Data flowing to Google Sheets.

phases.name: Rubric Build
phases.title: Rubric calibration — externalise consultant judgement
phases.desc: 13A superseded by master-sheet validation path. Rubric feeds the matching engine in Phase 6. Zoho ID canonicality question folds into this phase. New input for later: search_fingerprint convergence (same search shape across consultants) is rubric-relevant evidence.

deliverables.label: Zoho ID integration + canonicality decision (Zoho vs ISH-format)

milestone.label: Evaluation rubric v1 signed off by Ishwa

phases.name: Sourcing Layer
phases.title: Sourcing compression — 16.2 at v3.1, fingerprints + duplicate detection live
phases.desc: 16.2 v3.1 live: consultant gate, Save with server-assigned SRCH-#### UIDs, Recall fully editable, dismissible save dialog, same-session re-save suppression, duplicate message ('Identical to SRCH-####, which you saved on [date]. Logged as a repeat.'). Backend 20.2 v3.1: search_fingerprint (consultant-agnostic content key) on every record; same fingerprint + same consultant = soft flag (row written, duplicate_of + parent_saved in JSON, flat mapping to earliest row); different consultant = clean save, linked silently by fingerprint for convergence mining. Verified across Somanshu (flagged) + Chhaya (clean) 18 Jul. Descriptor CONTENT open — Shalini to choose A2 (target_profile excerpt) vs B (AI one-liner).

deliverables.label: 16.2 — Sourcing Assistant v3.1 — live on GitHub Pages
20.2 — Search Log script v3.1 — deployed, contained (Sheets-only)
Fingerprints + duplicate detection — verified across two consultants
Live demo with Ishwa — awaiting their response
Share Sourcing_Search_Log view-only with Shalini (direct email add)
Descriptor content decision — on agenda for Shalini call
LinkedIn Recruiter status confirmed with Shalini

milestone.label: Consultants using v3.1 with Search Memory in live workflow

phases.name: Matching Engine
phases.title: Matching engine — fresh-build pivot; calibrates on live-captured data
phases.desc: Fresh-build pivot confirmed 17 Jul: no legacy back-fill. Live capture over ~6 months builds the training set — candidate-level verdicts are the training unit. Calibration begins ~Q4 2026. At calibration: group Search Log by search_fingerprint — recurring shapes = mandate archetypes / template candidates.

deliverables.label: Seed data — 3 mandates, 11 candidates, verdicts from Varsha
Training dataset via live capture (~6 months)

phases.blocker: Awaiting live-capture dataset. Calibration begins ~Q4 2026 when meaningful candidate-verdict volume exists.

phases.name: Live Data Capture
phases.title: Pipeline live-tested working — distribution track PARKED behind Ishwa context call
phases.desc: Pipeline (15.2 → contained 17.4 → Sheet 19 + Drive folders per mandate) live-tested by Amit 18 Jul — works. Client-paced: no push from our end; the ~6-month window is calibration time. ENTIRE DISTRIBUTION TRACK PARKED until post-Ishwa context call (w/c 20 Jul): formal E2E sign-off pass, consultant SOP (Shalini), joint Zoom walkthrough, consultant rollout. Do not resurface until Amit confirms the call happened.

deliverables.label: 17.4 — Apps Script v4 — deployed, contained scope
15.2 — Live Data Entry form — live, tested
Containment rebuild — broad Drive grants revoked
PARKED — joint Zoom walkthrough + weights validation

milestone.label: Pipeline verified. Distribution parked behind Ishwa context call.

phases.name: BD Analytics
phases.title: BD pattern analysis — strategic intelligence layer
phases.desc: Pattern analysis across 3+ years of mandate data. Close rates by sector, average search duration by mandate type, ghost client signals, BD pipeline conversion. Delivered as a strategic insight report for leadership.

milestone.label: BD analytics report delivered to Ishwa leadership

parked.label: E2E TEST — PARKED until post-Ishwa context call (w/c 20 Jul)
parked.scope: Formal E2E sign-off pass + everything downstream: consultant SOP (Shalini), joint Zoom walkthrough, consultant distribution of 15.2.
parked.note: Pipeline live-tested working by Amit 18 Jul. Do NOT resurface any of this track until Amit confirms the Ishwa context call has happened.

open_actions.action: Await Ishwa response — Sourcing Assistant live demo
open_actions.note: Downstream: data-location note, wider rollout — keyed to this.
Direct email add as Viewer — no open link. Somanshu later, same pattern.
A2 (target_profile excerpt) vs B (AI one-liner). Claude to prep meeting bullets when Amit asks. Rebuild is small either way.

open_actions.action: Zoho ID canonicality — deferred to engine/rubric build
open_actions.note: Folded into Phase 4/6. Mandate IDs stay machine-assigned/invisible to consultants meanwhile.

key_decisions.decision: Fresh-build pivot — live capture over ~6 months, no retrospective back-fill
key_decisions.rationale: Confirmed with Shalini/Somanshu 17 Jul. Six-month horizon accepted. Queue form retired.

key_decisions.decision: Training unit = candidate-level verdicts, not mandate count
key_decisions.rationale: Rejects define thresholds — the engine's 200→10 job is rejecting well.

key_decisions.decision: Containment is the project standard for all scripts
key_decisions.rationale: Multi-client account. Narrowest OAuth scopes; broad Drive grants revoked. Search Log script has zero Drive access.

key_decisions.decision: GitHub is form hosting only — never record-keeping (18 Jul)
key_decisions.rationale: Deployed-state record lives in the decisions log (98) and the 00 context file. Repo sanitisation at Amit's convenience, not an action item.

key_decisions.decision: Distribution track parked behind Ishwa context call (18 Jul)
key_decisions.rationale: E2E sign-off, SOP, Zoom walkthrough all pause. Pipeline itself verified working. Client-paced — no push.

key_decisions.decision: search_fingerprint + soft duplicate detection (18 Jul, rows 42-43)
key_decisions.rationale: Consultant-agnostic content key on every record. Same consultant repeat → flagged, row still written with duplicate_of (flat mapping to earliest parent). Cross-consultant identical → clean save, linked silently — convergence mined later by grouping on fingerprint. Driven by Amit's 'across 3 consultants' question.

key_decisions.decision: Filename bumps never Claude's default (18 Jul, row 37)
key_decisions.rationale: Propose, Amit decides. Same-day iterations stay inside existing filename — avoids hub/repo/URL re-sync churn.
Behavioural claims about deployed code verified against source before stated. Lesson from duplicate-row bug.
